title: AI As Tool Creator: The Next Frontier In Knowledge Work

title_detail.value: AI As Tool Creator: The Next Frontier In Knowledge Work

author: Charles Betz
summary: As I move into my second six months of using AI daily, I’m convinced that its most overlooked role isn’t writing content (or even code) but creating tools. We all know how generative AI has shaken up software development, writing code at scale and collapsing cycle times. But AI isn’t just a writer — it’s a toolsmith.

summary_detail.value: As I move into my second six months of using AI daily, I’m convinced that its most overlooked role isn’t writing content (or even code) but creating tools. We all know how generative AI has shaken up software development, writing code at scale and collapsing cycle times. But AI isn’t just a writer — it’s a toolsmith.

title: AWS Makes Agentic Push At AWS Summit New York City 2025

title_detail.value: AWS Makes Agentic Push At AWS Summit New York City 2025

author: Bill Martorelli
summary: AWS Summit New York City is a smaller cousin to the re:Invent mega-conference set for the late fall in Las Vegas, so most big announcements tend to wait until that event, but agentic AI won’t wait, despite its relatively modest take-up to date.
